🎯 Sales positioning scripts
Against Dext: “While Dext excels at document capture, Lightyear provides complete AP automation with PO management, 3-way matching, and supplier controls — critical for hospitality and multi-site operations.”
On price: “Dext is cheaper to start, but lacks the controls that prevent overcharging. Lightyear’s automated price checking typically pays for itself within weeks.”

🎯 Sales positioning scripts
Key position: “ApprovalMax makes sure the right people say yes. Lightyear makes sure what they’re saying yes to is correct — with price checking against agreed rates built in.”
On 3-way matching: “ApprovalMax limits 3-way matching to higher tiers. Lightyear includes line-level 3-way matching on all plans.”

🎯 Sales positioning scripts
Key position: “Zahara controls your budget before you spend. Lightyear controls what suppliers charge after you’ve committed — catching overcharges at line level against agreed rates.”
On price overlap: “Zahara and Lightyear are in a similar price bracket. The question is whether you need spend governance or supplier accuracy controls — or both.”

🎯 Sales positioning scripts
Key position: “Compleat manages what you’re buying. Lightyear controls what you’re being charged for it — verifying prices against agreed supplier rates at line level.”
On transparency: “Compleat requires a sales conversation before you can see pricing. Lightyear publishes all pricing openly and offers a full 30-day trial with no credit card.”
